title: pentaschistis pictigluma var. mannii
intro: Pentaschistis pictigluma var. mannii is a type of flowering plant, specifically a type of grass, native to the island of New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Pentaschistis pictigluma var. mannii include its ability to exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Pentaschistis pictigluma var. mannii can be made into a topical cream or poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
